query:
SELECT section, COUNT(*) as count, MIN(created_at) as earliest, MAX(created_at) as latest
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE LEFT(created_at, 10) = '2026-05-11'
GROUP BY section;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
SELECT section, COUNT(*) as count, MIN(created_at) as earliest, MAX(created_at) as latest
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE LEFT(created_at, 10) = '2026-05-11'
GROUP BY section;
